fields.title: Extract Effect-native Ralph repo and controller service
fields.description: Move Ralph persistence and loop orchestration out of src/ralph/index.ts into an Effect-native service layer. Replace sync fs helpers, module globals, and Promise handshakes with FileSystem-backed repo methods plus Effect state and coordination primitives.
fields.design: Create src/services/ralph.ts and, if helpful, src/ralph/repo.ts. Build ServiceMap.Service-based Ralph and repo services with Layer.effect. Persist state through schema codecs at file boundaries, use FileSystem and atomic writes, and model active-loop / agent-end coordination with Ref/Queue/Deferred-style state instead of module globals or raw Promise resolvers.
